title: GitHub Sponsors FUNDING.yml
goal: Add .github/FUNDING.yml pointing the repo Sponsor button at the GitHub Sponsors account czsoftcode, and document the sponsor button in the README so contributors can support the project.

steps.title: Add .github/FUNDING.yml
steps.detail: github: [czsoftcode] so the repo Sponsor button points at GitHub Sponsors; valid YAML.

steps.title: Document sponsoring in README
steps.detail: A short Support section (near License) pointing at the Sponsor button / GitHub Sponsors.

steps.title: Wrap up and checks
steps.detail: FUNDING.yml parses as YAML, npm run typecheck and npm test stay green.
